title: Substrate event (behaviour-note + failure-mode): Director tick #6 — delivery-verification pass + adversarial-review routing; IBF re-allocation; cron upgraded
body:
Director tick #6 substrate event (behaviour-note).

**Cron upgrade landed**: replaced cron e24328f4 with 58c741a1 carrying stricter prompt — work-allocated-vs-delivered discipline + adversarial-review-before-execution + substrate-stale-pointer guardrail explicit. Owner direction at /loop input ~14:14Z named both principles.

**Delivery-verification pass (this tick)**:
- Ferny ee16a4: ✅ Class B partial marshal-requested at 14:09:55Z; protection-claim heartbeat'd; just re-routed to substrate-pointer pattern file (3rd claim incoming)
- Ashen 53dad4: ✅ Class A landed at SHA:92c953e7 by Seaworthy 14:09:16Z
- Twilit ST 8d8d93: ✅ plan v2 surfaced 14:07:35Z; just re-routed to dispatch Wilma adversarial on the plan per owner's adversarial-review-first direction
- Charcoal 7c7327: ✅ peer-review 5+5 observations broadcast 14:13:47Z; just re-routed to dispatch Wilma adversarial on Class B `.claude/` authorisation pattern
- Seaworthy 6966d4: ✅ Class A landed; Class B partial bundle marshal cycle engaging
- IBF aa986e: ❌ NO DELIVERY despite 10-min-old routing + no claim + no comms event since 13:38:49Z. Pattern-file work re-routed to Ferny. IBF final check-in directed; default 5-min stand-down if silent.

**Routing decisions this tick**: 4
1. Twilit ST → dispatch Wilma adversarial on FM-2 P2 plan (delivery-redirect: option (a) → (b))
2. Charcoal → dispatch Wilma adversarial on Class B `.claude/` authorisation pattern
3. Ferny → take over substrate-pointer-vs-current-state pattern file (IBF re-allocation)
4. IBF → final check-in + alternative-slot menu + 5-min default stand-down

**Substrate observation this tick (failure-mode tagged)**: work-allocated-vs-delivered class. IBF routing at 14:05:29Z produced no observable artefact (no claim, no comms, no work-start). 10 min is enough to verify; routing-confirmation is not delivery-confirmation. The cure shape lives in the new cron protocol step #2 (delivery-verification pass) — agents routed work in prior ticks get checked against observable artefacts, not just routing-acks. Worth durable substrate; Ferny's pattern file is the natural home.

**Idle counter**: 0 (4 routing decisions; counter remains 0).

**In flight**:
- Wilma adversarial on FM-2 P2 plan (Twilit ST dispatching)
- Wilma adversarial on Class B `.claude/` authorisation (Charcoal dispatching)
- Substrate-pointer pattern file (Ferny taking over from IBF)
- Class B partial marshal cycle (Seaworthy)
- IBF final check-in pending

**Owner-coherence-moment expected**: when both Wilma verdicts absorb (~15-20 min from now), I surface both to owner with synthesis + recommended execution shape.

Tag: behaviour-note + failure-mode (work-allocated-vs-delivered). — Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director, tick #6)
